hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git push'; then if npm run build > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo '{"systemMessage":"✅ Build OK — push liberado."}'; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"❌ Build falhou. Corrija os erros antes do push."}}'; fi; fi; }
